gazette: Official Gazette No. 32769 dated 31 December 2024, 4th Duplicate
title: Communiqué on the Inspection of Certain Textile, Garment and Leather Products (Product Safety and Inspection: 2025/18)
bodyHtml:
Communiqué on the Inspection of Certain Textile, Garment and Leather Products (Product Safety and Inspection: 2025/18) has been published.

Photographs of products directed to actual inspection, taken in the customs area, must be uploaded to the system.

Nickel (in case of direct and prolonged contact with the skin) and Dimethylfumerate (DMFu) tests have been added to the tests that shoes and leather goods in Chapter 42 may be subject to depending on their nature.

Only children's clothing can be subject to the TS EN 14682 (Safety in children's clothing - Cords and drawstrings used in children's clothing - Specifications) and TS EN 14878 (Textiles - Burning behaviour of children's nightwear - Specifications) standards.

There were no changes in the list of goods within the scope of the Communique, other than the tariff correlation.

The transition process

TEMPORARY ARTICLE 1 - (1) Importation of products for which a transport document was issued in the country of origin before 1/1/2025 to be shipped to Turkey for export purposes or which were submitted to the customs administrations in accordance with the customs legislation shall be finalised in accordance with the Communiqué on the Inspection of Certain Textile Garments and Leather Products (Product Safety and Inspection: 2024/18), which was repealed by Article 15, upon the request of the importer company until 28/2/2025 (including this date).

Please click for the complete list of products covered by the Communique.
